title: Reign of Nether - Empires Arise RTS
description: This is  a modpack that includes the RTS (Reign of Nether) mod created by SoLegendary
body:
![Banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d590212ad33ee5185f3b6059ab2f15d56287299_0.webp) # Empires Arise RTS

This modpack includes the Reign of Nether mod made by SoLegendary

So please join SoLegendary's [Discord](https://discord.gg/YNNMr2S9Tt) to show some support 💪 ### Datapack The datapack for the correct world gen is at SoLegendary's [mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts) ### Included
Mods - EMF - ETF - Canary - e4mc - Entity Culling - FerriteCore - ModernFix - Oculus - Reign of Nether RTS - Oculus
Resourcepacks - Bare Bones - Faithful 32x - Faithful 64x - Fresh Animations - Fresh Animations - Extensions - Fresh Moves
Shaders - Complementary Shaders
## Reign of Nether The **Reign of Nether** mod adds a **RTS** (Real-time strategy) mode to minecraft. When I saw it the first time I tought, Man that is **impressive**. This modpack is released on the 1.0.5 version of the **Reign of Nether** mod. And the quality of this mod is just impressive. It is one of the **gems** in the minecraft modding community. I strongly belive this mod made by **SoLegendary** will become as known as some of the big mods in the minecraft comunity. That is why I made this modpack to help other people to install all of the required mods with some QOL mods. For known bugs check out **SoLegendary Discord** I really hope you enjoy this **modpack** I made! **Enjoy your day**
